source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing the int8 dense compute substitution abstraction.

requested_items.objective: Substitute measured signed-int8 dense GEMM compute into the Q8/K8/V6 Llama7B dual-stream physical feasibility model and report whether dual_mac now fits the physical compute budget.

expected_result.reason: The job should report whether measured int8 dense compute removes the dual_mac compute-area deficit under the same quality-gated mixed-precision schedule.
